title: 2024 USAMO Problems/Problem 5
problem: Point $D$ is selected inside acute triangle $ABC$ so that $\angle DAC=\angle ACB$ and $\angle BDC=90^\circ+\angle BAC$ . Point $E$ is chosen on ray $BD$ so that $AE=EC$ . Let $M$ be the midpoint of $BC$ . Show that line $AB$ is tangent to the circumcircle of triangle $BEM$ .
solution:
Let $\angle DBT = \alpha$ and $\angle BEM = \beta$ .
Extend AD intersects BC at point T, then TC = TA, TE is perpendicular to AC Thus, AB is the tangent of the circle BEM Then the question is equivalent as the $\angle ABT$ is the auxillary angle of $\angle BEM$ . ontinued
